DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS CHRISTOPHER LESPERANCE AND VOLUME SERVICES, INC DBA CENTERPLATE'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO THE REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE AND FOR SANCTIONS = THE PRO TEM JUDGE HAS ISSUED THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, PROPOUNDED BY DEFENDANT ON DECEMBER 30, 2014, WITHIN 30 DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. BOTH PARTIES' REQUESTS FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET NIVER. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEVE L. HERNANDEZ, ESQ. of Barnes & Thornburg LLP, Tel No. 310-284-3880 appearing for the Defendant Volume Services, Inc dba Centerplate;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT VOLUME SERVICES, INC DBA CENTERPLATE'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions is granted, no opposition. Terminating sanction ordered against plaintiff. The request for monetary sanctions is denied because it was not stated in the notice. See CCP sec. 2023.040. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ronald D. Rosengarten of Rosengarten & Associates telephone number 818-225-5070 for Plaintiff.
Steve L. Hernandez of Barnes & Thornburg LLP telephone number 310-284-3880 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Parties did not contest the tentative rulings. The Court adopted the tentative rulings as follows:
1) DEFENDANTS CHRISTOPHER LESPERANCE and VOLUME SERVICES, INC DBA CENTERPLATE's MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES = Defendant's motion to compel responses to Form Interrogatories - General is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve responses to Form Interrogatories - General, Set No. 1, propounded by Defendant on December 30, 2014, within 30 days after service of notice of entry of this order. Both parties' requests for monetary sanctions are DENIED. Order signed.
2) DEFENDANTS CHRISTOPHER LESPERANCE and VOLUME SERVICES, INC DBA CENTERPLATE's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Employment And For Sanctions = Defendant's motion to compel responses to Form Interrogatories - Employment Law is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve responses to Form Interrogatories - Employment Law, Set No. 1, propounded by Defendant on December 30, 2014, within 30 days after service of notice of entry of this order. Both parties' requests for monetary sanctions are DENIED. Order signed.
3) DEFENDANTS CHRISTOPHER LESPERANCE and VOLUME SERVICES, INC DBA CENTERPLATE's Motion To Compel Responses To The Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Sanctions = The Pro Tem Judge has issued the following tentative ruling: Defendant's motion to compel responses to Requests for Production of Documents is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve responses to the Requests for Production of Documents, Set One, propounded by Defendant on December 30, 2014, within 30 days after service of notice of entry of this order. Both parties' requests for monetary sanctions are DENIED. Order signed.
4) DEFENDANTS CHRISTOPHER LESPERANCE and VOLUME SERVICES, INC DBA CENTERPLATE's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition And For Sanctions = Defendant's motion to compel Plaintiff's deposition is GRANTED. Said deposition to be held within 45 days after service of notice of entry of this order. Both parties' requests for monetary sanctions are DENIED. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Margaret Niver. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
